title: Guard: block inline-eval reaches into bin/lib internals; FIX names the paved read
action: Per D 3fbe2f79: add exported checkBinLibImportBashCommand(command) to lib/guards.mjs that DENIES a Bash command which is an inline eval (node -e / --eval / -p) whose script text imports/requires a bin/lib or templates/lib module; return {allow:false, reason} else null. Wire it into bee-write-guard.mjs Bash branch alongside checkGitBashCommand (~834-848), surfacing an ERROR/WHY/FIX denial whose FIX names 'bee status --json' and 'bee <group> --help --json' as the paved read. Then run the regen sequence INSIDE this cell in order: node scripts/render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs, then node skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply, then node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write.

truths: globalScribingDebt is already public in status --json.scribing_debt
the Bash tool_input.command allow/deny scaffold lives in hooks/test_write_guard.mjs (NOT test_hook_contracts.mjs — gather Q5 ref was wrong)
artifacts: two-direction negative control in hooks/test_write_guard.mjs: inline node -e import(bin/lib) DENIED, file-based node x.mjs import ALLOWED
prohibitions: NEVER block file-based node <path>.mjs runs — tests import lib legitimately
no byte drift between templates/lib and .bee/bin/lib mirror

verify: node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check

trace.outcome: Added checkBinLibImportBashCommand to guards.mjs (canonical skills/bee-hive/templates/lib, propagated to .bee/bin/lib + 4 plugin mirrors); wired into hooks/bee-write-guard.mjs's Bash branch alongside checkGitBashCommand. Denies an inline-eval node -e/--eval/-p Bash command whose script text imports/requires a bin/lib/ or templates/lib/ module; FIX names bee status --json and bee <group> --help --json as the paved read. Never touches file-based node <path>.mjs runs. Two-direction negative control added to hooks/test_write_guard.mjs (row70 deny, row71 allow). Regen sequence run; mirrors byte-identical.

Overall tail: `3 FAILURE(S)`.","verification_run":"After implementing checkBinLibImportBashCommand in guards.mjs, wiring it into bee-write-guard.mjs Bash branch, and running the regen sequence (render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs -> onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply -> release_manifest.mjs --write): `node hooks/test_write_guard.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/ledger_parity.mjs --check` -> ALL PASS (168 assertions incl. row70 DENY + row71 ALLOW); release_manifest --check: 510 file(s) match stored manifest; ledger_parity --check: .bee/bin/** matches the .bee/onboarding.json managed-hash ledger."}
